title: coreopsis major
intro: Coreopsis major, also known as the large-flowered tickseed, is a perennial plant native to North America that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Coreopsis major include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various ailments such as arthritis, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. Coreopsis major can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various modes of administration to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
